title: RubiChess
text: Home * Engines * RubiChess Macrothylacia rubi [1] RubiChess , an UCI compliant open source chess engine by Andreas Matthies , written in C++ , licensed under the GPL v3.0 . RubiChess started in 2017 as 0x88 engine and soon evolved to a bitboard engine first using rotated bitboards and subsequently magic bitboards (about 24% faster) to determine sliding piece attacks [2] . In September 2020, Andreas Matthies announced RubiChess NNUE [3] .
